intro: Liebrechtsia kotschyi, also known as Sceletium tortuosum, is a succulent plant native to the Cape Province of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, which include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting a sense of calm, and improving mood. The bioactive constituents of Liebrechtsia kotschyi include mesembrine, a psychoactive alkaloid, as well as other flavonoids and phenolic compounds.
